title: Helping a Stranger
content: On his way home from work, Ethan noticed an older man looking confused near the bus station. The man held a map in his hands and seemed unable to understand the directions around him. Ethan stopped to ask if he needed help. It turned out the man was visiting the city for the first time and was trying to find a small hotel nearby. Since the hotel was only a few streets away, Ethan decided to walk there with him. Along the way, they talked about travel, family, and the differences between their hometowns. Before leaving, the man thanked Ethan warmly and said the kindness had made his difficult day much better.
